20],[369,466,1776533715429],[369,465,1776533715437],[369,464,1776533715446],[369,464,1776533715708],[369,465,1776533715727],[366,468,1776533715741],[362,475,1776533715757],[355,487,1776533715769],[348,501,1776533715782],[342,518,1776533715793],[336,533,1776533715805],[332,545,1776533715820],[329,554,1776533715833],[328,557,1776533715849],[328,558,1776533715866],[329,557,1776533715879],[330,557,1776533715894],[330,556,1776533715911],[331,556,1776533715926],[332,556,1776533715933],[332,555,1776533715944],[333,555,1776533715974],[334,555,1776533715989],[335,555,1776533715997],[335,556,1776533716013],[336,556,1776533716031],[337,556,1776533716057],[338,556,1776533716077],[339,556,1776533716085],[340,556,1776533716102],[340,556,1776533716117],[341,557,1776533716144],[342,557,1776533716165],[343,557,1776533716186],[344,558,1776533716204]],"mm-mp":20.131774707757703,"md":[[333,556,1776533715966]],"md-mp":4266.5,"mu":[[333,556,1776533716109]],"mu-mp":4286.5},"v":1,"tc":{}}
